title: microcos fibrocarpa
intro: Microcos fibrocarpa, also known as the Yellow Bitterleaf or Yellow Bitter, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Microcos fibrocarpa include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and skin care. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine in various Southeast Asian cultures, where it is valued for its versatility and efficacy.
